Available recipes:
    alias
    bbrew                                    # Install applications from curated Brewfiles (includes full-desktop.Brewfile with GNOME Circle apps)
    benchmark                                # Run a one minute system benchmark
    bios                                     # Boot into this device's BIOS/UEFI screen
    bios-info                                # Show BIOS info
    bluefin-apps                             # For additional applications, use: ujust bbrew
    bluefin-cli                              # Configure Bluefin-CLI Terminal Experience with Brew
    changelogs                               # Show the changelog
    check-idle-power-draw                    # Measure Idle Power Draw
    check-local-overrides                    # Check for local overrides
    clean-system
    cncf
    device-info                              # Gather device info to a pastebin
    devmode                                  # alias for toggle-devmode
    dx-group                                 # Configure docker,incus-admin,libvirt, container manager, serial permissions
    enroll-secure-boot-key                   # Enroll Nvidia driver & KMOD signing key for secure boot - Enter password "universalblue" if prompted
    install-jetbrains-toolbox                # Install JetBrains Toolbox | https://www.jetbrains.com/toolbox-app/
    install-opentabletdriver                 # Install OpenTabletDriver, an open source, cross-platform, user-mode tablet driver
    install-system-flatpaks                  # Install system flatpaks for rebasers
    jetbrains-toolbox                        # alias for install-jetbrains-toolbox
    logs-last-boot                           # Show all messages from last boot
    logs-this-boot                           # Show all messages from this boot
    powerwash                                # Factory reset this device (experimental)
    rebase-helper                            # Rebase assistant
    shell
    toggle-devmode                           # Toggle between Bluefin and the Developer Experience
    toggle-tpm2                              # TPM2 auto-unlock toggle
    toggle-updates                           # Turn automatic updates on or off
    toggle-user-motd                         # Toggle display of the user-motd in terminal
    uid
    update                                   # Update system, flatpaks and homebrew packages all at once
